# BP-155 negative: MaxBytesReader bounds the request before decoding.
lang: go
file: BP-155-safe.go
variant: bounded-decoder-request-body
---
package api

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func update(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	limited := http.MaxBytesReader(w, r.Body, 1<<20)
	var request struct {
		Name string `json:"name"`
	}
	if err := json.NewDecoder(limited).Decode(&request); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
}
